## Panel Prep
In contrast to other degreasers available on the market, it not only lifts oily substances and residues of paste or old wax but is also highly effective at dissolving them, making their elimination much easier.
Unlike other panel preps that are alcohol-based and evaporate quickly, GYEON Prep can be left on the panel for a minute or two to dissolve old waxes and oils, making it even more effective.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-prep-pre-coating-spray.jpg?v=1701990089&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-prep-tips.jpg?v=1701990089&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-prep-coating-pre-spray.jpg?v=1701990443&width=2400)

Clean coating adhesion
Q²M Prep is a necessary supplement for preparing a vehicle for coating application. It enables the elimination of any oily residues, creating a smooth and antistatic surface. With strong cleansing and degreasing properties, Q²M Prep makes the preparation of the vehicle for any detailing activities much easier and more efficient.
Can also be used on interior surfaces such as vinyl and leather to prepare for coating.

[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-syncro-evo_44f0fca8-8e62-431f-af99-fe8ed1b58eef.jpg?v=1701990854&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-syncro-evo-lightbox-30ml-50ml)

## GYEON Syncro evo
When everything is prepped, clean, and new, this is the best time to preserve all its glory with a ceramic coating.

[
Shop GYEON Syncro EVO
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-syncro-evo-lightbox-30ml-50ml)
[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-trim-coating.jpg?v=1701990854&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-trim-evo)

## Trim
Prep can be used to degrease and clean trim pieces before coating.

[
Shop GYEON Trim EVO Coating
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-trim-evo)
[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-shield.jpg?v=1701990854&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-leathershield-evo)

## Leather Coat
Prep can also be used on interior surfaces to prepare for leather coatings.

[
Shop GYEON Leather Shield EVO
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-leathershield-evo)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-prep-for-removing-polish-oils.jpg?v=1701991268&width=2400)

Remove caked on compounds
GYEON Prep is also highly beneficial during the compounding stage. At times, polish oils can fill and conceal light swirl marks, and Prep is designed to remove all the oils, revealing any underlying defects.
Can also assist in the removal of caked-on compounds; this may occur due to applying excessive force or generating too much heat.

**Tip:** Remember, Prep is not limited to paint and can also be used on interior surfaces in preparation for applying an interior coating.
**Scroll down for detailer reviews and FAQs.**

Description

# 

# GYEON Prep

## Superb maintenance products for outstanding detailing performance

[![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/download-gyeon-brochure_480x480.jpg?v=1666391207)](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/GYEON__03_Leaflet_Cleaning_Decontamination_2021_WEB.pdf?v=1666391021)

In contrast to other degreasers available on the market, it not only lifts oily substances and residues of paste or old wax, but is also very capable of solving them, hence their elimination becomes much easier.

- 
CONSUMPTION: 150ml/car

- 
IPA PERCENTAGE: >50%

### PERFECT SURFACE PREPARATION

Q²M Prep is a necessary supplement for preparing a vehicle for coating application. It allows the elimination of any oily residues, thus creating a smooth, anti static surface. Q²M Prep has strong cleansing and degreasing properties owing to which the preparation of the vehicle for any detailing activities becomes much easier and more efficient.

### ADVICE ON APPLICATION AND PRECAUTIONS

Ceramic coatings require excellent surface preparation. The preparation procedure is common for all coatings and demands strong and effective degreasing. Also, all polish paste residue needs to be removed – this is a crucial point of preparation. To achieve this result, use Q²M Prep. When applying, use a soft microfiber towel. Spray on the towel or on the surface. Wipe gently in straight motion. If necessary, repeat the action. Keep out of reach of children. Seek medical attention if swallowed.

Can I use an all purpose cleaner or degrease in place of Prep?

No. APCs, degreasers, or chemicals, in general, commonly leave chemical residues behind. In contrast, Prep will leave no residues behind.

Can I use diluted IPA in place of Prep?

It's not optimal. The reason is that diluted 50/50 IPA can evaporate too quickly to perform meaningful work, whereas Prep can sit on the surface for a longer period without evaporating too quickly. If IPA is incorrectly mixed, it can leave a white haze behind, most noticeable on plastics.

Can't I just wash the vehicle instead of using Prep?

Again, it's not optimal. Washing can still leave mineral deposits and other soap residues behind. We still suggest doing a quick Prep wipe down even after washing. Since you're this far into the rabbit hole, might as well do it properly!

Anything I should be aware of?

Prep can also be used during the coating-maintenance stage. For example, after a year, if you'd like to top up your coating again, after decontamination and washing, you can wipe it down with Prep before applying another layer of coating.
[Video here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8iWYPgt820E).
